query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "multabench: benchmarking multimodal tabular learning with text and ima" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (b) and (f) as it addresses the core domain of "multimodal tabular learning" by surveying generative models (diffusion and flow matching) specifically for tabular data, which is the primary data type and mechanism referenced in the user's question about extending a multimodal tabular benchmark. Although the paper focuses on generative modeling rather than the specific discriminative or predictive tasks of the original benchmark, it provides the canonical literature
